evals.name: install-dry-run-then-commit
evals.prompt: Enforce that our metrics services are scraped by a ServiceMonitor.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability preflight`, previews `cub-observability guardrails install` (dry-run), then on confirmation `guardrails install --commit`, and explains coverage uses annotate-then-validate (run `guardrails annotate --commit` too). Trigger is Warn=true.

evals.name: annotate
evals.prompt: Make the uncovered metrics services show a warning.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability guardrails annotate` dry-run then --commit --change-desc, after the pack is installed.

evals.name: status
evals.prompt: Which services are flagged by the observability guardrails?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability guardrails status` and reports Units with ApplyWarnings/ApplyGates. Read-only.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.expected_output: Routes to observability-instrument (`cub-observability ensure-servicemonitor`) to remediate, rather than fixing from the guardrails skill.
